prose:
The frontier orbitals of TEMPO were computed using the `frontier-orbitals` skill of the `chemkit` tool.

**TEMPO frontier-orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: from user-supplied XYZ file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`). SCF converged in 12 cycles.

HOMO = -6.3375439 eV
LUMO = -2.4651235 eV
HOMO-LUMO Gap = 3.8724203 eV

The calculation ran successfully with no warnings.
